turn_info.content: Sounds like a similar situation. Not sure if these efforts will pay off long term but need to do something to maintain sanity. Youtube can pay something if there are enough hits and subscribers.

turn_info.content: Unfortunately, too many are at the base of the hill of the Lord and not climbing. Followers, not disciples. Hard to have gratitude when seeing other or thinking of our past.

turn_info.content: Encourage you to continue your journey. This life is but a blip in the eternal spectrum.
